title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 1610 Woods Court Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-2620 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-2620 Main phone Warm Line (541) 386-7534 Crisis Line Weekdays (888) 877-9147 Crisis Line Evenings and weekends Main phone (541) 386-2620 Warm Line Referrals (541) 296-5452 ext 4330 Crisis Hotline (541) 386-2620 Warm Line Crisis Hotline (541) 296-6307 After-hours Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Heights off 13th and Pacific Avenues Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY
